_README.purpose: AXIS 2 (inference-broker / residency) jurisdiction classification for OpenRouter SUB-PROVIDERS. Consumed by scripts/audit/provider_drift_static.py (Tier A). This is the MODERATE-tier control: a Chinese-LINEAGE seat may serve MODERATE work only if every provider in its openrouter_provider_route.only is classified 'western' here with a CURRENT (non-expired) review. Broker classification NEVER upgrades model lineage (Axis 1) — see conf/policy/model_lineage.json and governance/2026-07-13__llm-routing-jurisdiction-policy.md (CR-001, policy sections 1/4/5A/6).

classes.western: Non-Chinese-lineage infra provider domiciled in US/EU/UK/Canada-aligned trusted jurisdiction. Only 'western' + non-expired is valid inside a protected seat's `only` list.
classes.prc: PRC-owned/domiciled. Never valid in a protected seat's `only`. BLOCK.
classes.unknown: Unclassified / unclear beneficial ownership. Treated as NON-WESTERN for gating (fail-closed). BLOCK if used by a protected seat.

hard_rules: Every provider slug appearing in ANY seat's openrouter_provider_route.only MUST have an entry here. Missing == unknown == BLOCK.
review_expires_at < today AND provider is used by a protected seat => BLOCK (stale == non-compliant). Unused stale => WARN only.
No runtime WHOIS/ASN/geo inference. Human-reviewed registry + expiry ONLY.
CODEOWNERS review by @complina + @selena required to change any classification (jurisdiction/compliance + enforcement-surface).
_README.note_on_unknowns: morph, parasail, gmicloud are currently in live `only` lists (qwen seat) but are UNVERIFIED as of seeding. They are classified 'unknown' -> Tier A will BLOCK the qwen seat until Complina/Selena classify them OR they are removed from the qwen `only` list. This is the fail-closed default working as intended; resolve at PR review, do not pre-classify western without evidence.

atlas-cloud.ownership_basis: PENDING-COMPLINA verification of Atlas Cloud domicile

sambanova.ownership_basis: US (SambaNova Systems Inc., Palo Alto CA)

friendli.ownership_basis: FriendliAI — origin/domicile UNVERIFIED (FriendliAI has ROK/Korea roots; Korea is a Western-aligned trusted jurisdiction but this requires Complina confirmation before treating as 'western')

gmicloud.ownership_basis: UNVERIFIED — GMI Cloud domicile not confirmed
